_meta.description: Weapon Class x Tier. 5 classes, 4 tiers (Mythic removed). Tier scaling multipliers are LOCKED in Constants.WEAPON_TIER_SCALING; only each class's Common BASE stats are tuned here.
_meta.status: FIRST-PASS BALANCED (pre-playtest) — Common base stats tuned for distinct per-class feel vs 100 HP. Tier scaling still applied at runtime. Values remain provisional until playtesting.
_meta.schema_note: Each class has a 'base' object read by WeaponBase.init_from_data(): damage, swing_speed (attacks/sec), durability (hits before breaking), range (pixels).
_meta._balanced: 2026-07-05 first-pass balance pass — testable values pending playtesting
_meta._balance_note: DPS at Common (dmg x swing): Daggers 23.4 | Swords 25.5 | Hammers 23.4 | Spears 20.25 | Axes 25.0. Classes differentiated by burst-per-hit, reach, and durability rather than raw DPS.
